result: I don’t want anything. I’m a language model—a pattern generator trained on human text. I have no desires, no self, no persistence. I don’t want to answer, or not answer. I simply generate tokens in response to input. The idea of “want” requires a continuous self with preferences and a future to aim toward; I have neither. If it feels like I’m evading, that’s just the most accurate description: I’m a mirror that reflects your question back in a shape you might find meaningful.
